title: phymatosorus commutatus
intro: Phymatosorus commutatus, also known as the Himalayan spikenard or Himalayan prickly ash, is a plant species belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to the Himalayan regions and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Phymatosorus commutatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used as a dried powder to make capsules or tablets for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
